/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/pose_graph_3d.dir/pose_graph_3d.cpp.o -o pose_graph_3d  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/cuda-12.1/targets/x86_64-linux/lib /usr/local/lib/libceres.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libglog.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libgflags.so.2.2.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libspqr.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libtbb.so.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcholmod.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libamd.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcamd.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libccolamd.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcolamd.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libsuitesparseconfig.so -lrt /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libmetis.so /usr/local/cuda-12.1/targets/x86_64-linux/lib/libcudart.so /usr/local/cuda-12.1/targets/x86_64-linux/lib/libcusolver.so /usr/local/cuda-12.1/targets/x86_64-linux/lib/libcublas.so /usr/local/cuda-12.1/targets/x86_64-linux/lib/libculibos.a /usr/local/cuda-12.1/targets/x86_64-linux/lib/libcublasLt.so /usr/local/cuda-12.1/targets/x86_64-linux/lib/libcusparse.so /usr/local/cuda-12.1/targets/x86_64-linux/lib/libnvJitLink.so /usr/local/lib/libceres_cuda_kernels.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libopenblas.so -lpthread -lm -ldl
